name: Ministry of Higher Education and Scientific Research
notes: Sets Tawjihi minima and public university seat allocation; issues foreign degree approvals.

name: Ministry of Education
notes: Licenses schools; sets Tawjihi and equivalency rules for IB/A-level/AP.

name: Accreditation and Quality Assurance Commission for Higher Education Institutions
notes: Evaluates programmes and recognizes foreign providers; key for CY/GR credential recognition.
